news.title: 西班牙首相强硬回击特朗普贸易威胁
news.title0: Spain's Pedro Sánchez hits back at Trump threat to sever trade saying 'no to war'
news.content: 西班牙首相桑切斯发表电视讲话，强烈反驳特朗普切断贸易的威胁，重申反对战争及“国际法崩溃”的立场。
news.content0: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has delivered a strong rebuttal to US President Donald Trump's threat to end trade with Spain by restating his opposition to war and what he called the "breakdown of international law".
news.author: BBC

news.title: 海湾国家称伊朗袭击“越过所有红线”
news.title0: 'All red lines have been crossed': Gulf states weigh response to Iranian strikes
news.content: 伊朗袭击将海湾国家置于中东新战争前线，多国称主权和民用设施遭袭，所有红线已被越过，正权衡回应选项。
news.content0: Gulf states have found themselves on the front line of the Middle East's newest war, and they are angry.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美伊冲突首批阵亡美军士兵身份确认
news.title0: First US soldiers to die in Iran conflict are identified
news.content: 美军确认了首批在美伊冲突中阵亡的六名士兵身份，他们于周日在科威特一处指挥中心遭无人机袭击身亡。
news.content0: The American military has named its first troops killed in the conflict between the US and Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 埃尔顿·约翰全家福入驻国家肖像馆
news.title0: Elton John's family photo hung in National Portrait Gallery
news.content: 艺术家凯瑟琳·奥比为埃尔顿·约翰爵士及其家人拍摄的肖像照，被伦敦国家肖像馆收藏并公开展出。
news.content0: A photo portrait of Sir Elton John, David Furnish and their two teenage sons has been unveiled by the National Portrait Gallery.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 韩国女子及医生因杀害新生儿被判谋杀罪
news.title0: South Korea woman and doctors guilty of murder of newborn baby
news.content: 韩国一女子在怀孕36周时寻求终止妊娠，其婴儿剖腹产后被放入冷冻柜致死，女子及两名涉案医生均被判谋杀罪。
news.content0: A South Korean court has convicted a woman and her two doctors of murder for killing the baby she had delivered.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 塔利班新法令允许丈夫殴打妻子
news.title0: Taliban allows men to beat their wives as long as they don’t break bones or leave open wounds
news.content: 阿富汗塔利班当局颁布严苛法令，规定鸡奸可判死刑，并允许丈夫殴打妻子，只要不造成骨折或明显持久伤痕。
news.content0: Taliban authorities in Afghanistan have issued a draconian decree that makes sodomy punishable by death and allows men to beat their wives so long as they don’t break bones or leave visible, lasting wounds.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 古巴指控六名流亡者涉恐怖主义
news.title0: Cuba charges six exiles with terrorism over Florida-registered speedboat attack
news.content: 古巴检方正式指控六名流亡者犯有“恐怖主义罪”，他们涉嫌驾驶佛罗里达注册的快艇进入古巴水域并与边防部队交火。
news.content0: Cuban prosecutors formally charged six people with “crimes of terrorism” and ordered them held in pretrial detention on Tuesday in connection with anincident last weekin which Cuban forces killed four Cuban nationals and wounded six others aboard a speedboat that entered Cuban waters.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 英国对四国实施首次签证禁令
news.title0: UK's first visa ban in asylum crackdown
news.content: 英国内政大臣称四国国民“滥用”英国慷慨，将对阿富汗、喀麦隆、缅甸和苏丹实施学习签证紧急刹车，并停止对阿富汗的工作签证。
news.content0: The government will halt visa routes for nationals from four countries who the home secretary says have "abused" the UK's generosity.
news.author: Sky News

news.title: 英国将向塞浦路斯部署“龙”号驱逐舰
news.title0: UK will deploy HMS Dragon in Cyprus, Sir Keir Starmer confirms
news.content: 英国首相斯塔默确认，将向塞浦路斯部署“龙”号驱逐舰及具备反无人机能力的直升机，以协助防御当地英军基地。
news.content0: Britain will deploy HMS Dragon and helicopters with anti-drone capabilities in Cyprus, Sir Keir Starmer has confirmed.
news.author: Sky News
